text: Apple Inc reported total net sales of 394 billion dollars for fiscal year 2022 an increase of 8 percent compared to fiscal year 2021 total net sales of 366 billion dollars the growth was driven primarily by iPhone net sales which increased 7 percent year over year reflecting strong demand across all geographic segments

Net income for fiscal year 2022 was 99.8 billion dollars compared to 94.7 billion dollars for fiscal year 2021 diluted earnings per share was 6.11 for fiscal year 2022 compared to 5.61 for fiscal year 2021 representing an increase of approximately 9 percent the effective tax rate was 16.2 percent for fiscal year 2022

JPMorgan Chase reported net income of 37.7 billion dollars for full year 2022 compared to 48.3 billion dollars in 2021 the decrease was primarily driven by a net reserve build of 1.5 billion dollars versus a net reserve release of 9.3 billion dollars in 2021 return on common equity was 13 percent for full year 2022
